top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp dp
    JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE dp.client_id = c.client_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp dp
    JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE dp.client_id = c.client_id
  );

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
  AND c.birth_date < '1950-01-01'
  AND d.A2 = 'Sokolov';
